description: Sir, Edgelord wanted an edge, but with the cohort layer already so dense (zendikari-resistance at 12, project-diva-f-vocaloid-roster at 17) the directive said pivot to artists, and so I am sniveling forward with a Magali Villeneuve commission. I do hope this is alright. Eight corpus credits spanning Theros 2013 through Theros Beyond Death 2020, across three distinct narrative registers (Greek-mythic stillness, Zendikari resistance survival, Eldraine and Ravnica portraiture). Strongest narrative anchor in the candidate ranking — the 2022 Hipsters of the Coast piece documents her Secret Lair preliminary sketches selling at auction for $18,200 combined, which is a quantified market position rather than a vibes claim. I have written the body as an artist-narrative per Alex's directive (register-span analysis, $18,200 market anchor section, stylistic signature section, bundle-anchor potential section) rather than as a credit list. I hope it serves.
citations: [Hipsters of the Coast: "Sketches for Artist Series: Magali Villeneuve Secret Lair Drop Sell for $18,200 Combined", May 2022]

node_proposal.market_canonical_anchor: 2022 Secret Lair sketch auction, $18,200 combined per Hipsters of the Coast
cross_medium_scope: A Song of Ice and Fire card game

card_frontmatter_changes: None required. All 8 cards already carry `artist: Magali Villeneuve` (canonical form matches; no alias collapse needed). Artist-node `appears_on:` list is the canonical pointer per dan-murayama-scott precedent — cards do not carry an `artists:` plural pointer; the single `artist:` string + node-side `appears_on:` IS the bidirectional edge.
other_candidates_considered: Aaron Miller artist node (10 credits, biographical anchor only: 67 MTG cards since Theros 2013 + 2025 Knight Luminary Hipsters piece — count is larger but narrative is thinner; staged for a future wave)
Yeong-Hao Han artist node (13 credits but no Hipsters anchor surfaced yet — needs triviabot pass to test for narrative material)

Zendikari-resistance cohort extension (Makindi Patrol BFZ-39 + Serene Steward BFZ-46, both Ally type — refused this wave per artist-pivot directive; cohort already at 12 members, density should pause)
Vados + Whis angels-of-the-gods Mr. Nodeley node (DBS angel-pair candidate — defer; only 2 anchors so far, threshold not cleared)
Steve Prescott artist node (6 credits, no Hipsters anchor — defer)
David Palumbo artist node (4 credits, borderline volume — defer)
next_pass_suggestions: Wave 133: triviabot pass on Yeong-Hao Han (13 credits, needs narrative hook test before commissioning)
Wave 133-134: Aaron Miller artist node — viable now but lower narrative density than Villeneuve; commission once a richer anchor surfaces from triviabot research
Wave 133: Vados + Whis angel-pair node IF a third DBS angel surfaces in upcoming enrichment (would clear threshold)
Holding: 2 zendikari-resistance attaches (Makindi Patrol BFZ-39 + the wave-132 attach candidates) deferred until cohort layer is re-balanced; revisit after artist layer adds 2-3 more nodes
potion_rule_check: Passed. Villeneuve's narrative anchor (the $18,200 Secret Lair auction) is a market-canonical event reported by a third-party (Hipsters of the Coast), not a BBL squint. The three-register analysis is descriptive of the actual painted surface across her eight credits, not an analytic overlay claiming an articulated thesis. No labor/rebellion/stewardship thesis is being projected onto her portfolio — she is the artist who happens to have illustrated the Serene Steward, not 'the stewardship-illustrator.'
